text: A robotic arm picks up a red cube from a table and places it in a blue bin.
A robotic gripper grasps a cylindrical object and moves it to a different location.
A robot arm pushes a small ball across a flat surface into a target zone.
A robotic manipulator lifts a glass of water and pours it into a sink.
A robot arm stacks three blocks in a pyramid formation.
A robotic hand opens a drawer, retrieves a tool, and closes the drawer.
A robot arm rotates a screwdriver to tighten a bolt.
A robotic gripper picks up a paperclip and places it in a container.
A robot arm pushes a button on a control panel.
A robotic manipulator assembles two parts together.
A robot arm moves a key to unlock a small box.
A robotic gripper lifts a cup and drinks from it.
A robot arm pushes a lever to activate a mechanism.
A robotic manipulator places a lid on a jar.
A robot arm picks up a pen and writes on a piece of paper.
A robotic gripper moves a chess piece to a new square on a board.
A robot arm opens a bottle cap.
A robotic manipulator arranges books on a shelf.
A robot arm pushes a toy car across a track.
A robotic gripper picks up a coin and deposits it in a slot.
